_comment: How XO maps its platform to DAP. Shows what is mapped, not implementation details.

identity.capabilities: Multi-method verification including biometric liveness, social accounts, and on-chain SBT

field_mapping.verification_level: Computed from highest-strength verification method completed

discovery.capabilities: ML-based recommendation engine with vectorized interest matching

field_mapping.reputation_tier: Internal tiers mapped to DAP standard tiers

reputation.capabilities: Behavioral scoring system with anti-gaming mechanics and tiered leagues

field_mapping.reputation_tier: Internal multi-tier system mapped to DAP 4-tier standard

break_ice.capabilities: Contextual conversation starters from dual-profile analysis

conversation_health.capabilities: Multi-signal conversation quality scoring with trend analysis
